# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 229.248 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.5080
  biquad b0=1.00171950554 b1=-1.99143957713 b2=0.989944256632 a1=-1.99143957713 a2=0.991663762174

  biquad b0=1.00111199333 b1=-1.99455812885 b2=0.993497014536 a1=-1.99455812885 a2=0.994609007865
